message:
feat(core): add F16 and BF16 half-precision dtype support with promotion rules

Introduce F16 and BF16 dtype variants backed by the 'half' crate (v2.4),
enabling half-precision tensor storage and arithmetic throughout the stack.

Core changes:
- Add DType::F16 and DType::BF16 with 2-byte size, is_half() predicate,
  and is_floating_point() inclusion
- Extend dtype promotion hierarchy: F16+BF16→F32, half+F32→F32,
  half+F64→F64 (matching PyTorch torch.promote_types() semantics)
- Update promote_types() rank ordering: Bool→I32→I64→F16/BF16→F32→F64

Dispatch layer:
- Add F16/BF16 arms to all element-wise operations (add, mul, div, neg,
  exp, log, pow, sqrt, abs, sign, relu, sigmoid, tanh, clamp, matmul)
- Route half-precision through F32 intermediate computation for operations
  lacking native half-precision hardware support

Autograd/NN:
- Fix exhaustive match patterns in test assertions to handle new dtypes
- Suppress unused variable warnings in test closures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
